race.comment: EASY LOVE (3) is a consistent conveyance who is yet to miss the top five in ten career outings to date. Goes well for hoop Guthmann-Chester who has two wins from just three steers and should be right there at the business end. Stablemate WOWZINO (4) is improving with racing this time in and will be ready to peak now third-up from the break. Hard to beat in this suitable contest. Former Victorian BLAZING HARRY (1) has looked handy in all three runs since joining the new stable and gets a stack of weight off with the 3kg claim. Top-three commodity on best form. FARNBOROUGH (2) saves his best form for this mile journey and looks a must for the exotics players. ADDITION (11) next in line from the favourable draw.
